summary: Verified CRITICAL PVP Bug Fix for isPlayer1 Determination and Photo Assignment. All 7 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend code review confirms all fixes are in place. The root cause was that isPlayer1 was derived from stale session?.player1_id prop instead of API response. Fix introduces confirmedPlayer1Id state that gets set from API response, ensuring correct photo assignment for both creator AND joiner.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PVPBattleArena.jsx Line 192: confirmedPlayer1Id state added to track player1_id from API response
✅ PVPBattleArena.jsx Line 196: isPlayer1 now uses confirmedPlayer1Id || session?.player1_id
✅ PVPBattleArena.jsx Lines 677-681: Polling saves player1_id from API response to confirmedPlayer1Id
✅ PVPBattleArena.jsx Line 684: actualIsPlayer1 computed from API response for correct photo assignment
✅ PVPBattleArena.jsx Lines 697, 716-720, 738-739: All photo assignments use actualIsPlayer1
✅ PVPBattleArena.jsx Line 132: MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS = 3 (reduced from higher value)
✅ PVPBattleArena.jsx Line 134: pollingMode state for fallback when WebSocket fails
✅ PVPBattleArena.jsx Lines 627-633: Reconnect limit check switches to polling mode after 3 attempts
✅ usePVPWebSocket.js Lines 343-346: Mobile hook also uses API response for player determination
✅ usePVPWebSocket.js Lines 374-379: Mobile photo assignment uses correct amPlayer1 determination
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users with minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL PVP isPlayer1 bug fix FULLY VERIFIED. The fix ensures: 1) Creator (player1) sees THEIR photo on left, opponent's on right, 2) Joiner (player2) sees THEIR photo on left, creator's on right, 3) Reconnect limited to 3 attempts then switches to polling mode (no endless spinner). All code changes confirmed in PVPBattleArena.jsx and usePVPWebSocket.js.

backend_pytest.test_isplayer1_determination_from_api: PASSED - Verifies API returns correct player1_id and player2_id
backend_pytest.test_photo_assignment_both_perspectives: PASSED - Verifies creator and joiner see correct photos
backend_pytest.test_tap_sync_both_players: PASSED - Verifies both players see each other's taps

frontend_browser_automation.create_game_screen: PASSED - Shows photo selection with 12 photos

verification_results.critical_bug_status: FIXED - All code changes verified in frontend and mobile
